name: Forecast schema and sanity [Nairobi]
description: Execute one declarative check, reusing the core env/client/gate fixtures.
descriptionHtml: Execute one declarative check, reusing the core env/client/gate fixtures.

parameters.name: spec_check
parameters.value: Check(env='weather', label='Forecast schema and sanity [Nairobi]', case={'name': 'Nairobi', 'latitude': -1.2921, 'longitude': 36.8219, 'timezone': 'Africa/Nairobi'}, spec={'name': 'Forecast schema and sanity', 'cases': 'cities.json', 'case_id': 'name', 'request': {'path': 'forecast', 'params': {'latitude': '${case.latitude}', 'longitude': '${case.longitude}', 'hourly': 'temperature_2m', 'timezone': 'auto'}}, 'expect_status': 200, 'validator': 'ForecastValidator', 'validate': 'single', 'asserts': [{'path': '$.latitude', 'approx': '${case.latitude}', 'tol': 1.0}, {'path': '$.longitude', 'approx': '${case.longitude}', 'tol': 1.0}, {'path': '$.hourly.time', 'length_gte': '${env.min_results_count}'}]})

parameterValues: Check(env='weather', label='Forecast schema and sanity [Nairobi]', case={'name': 'Nairobi', 'latitude': -1.2921, 'longitude': 36.8219, 'timezone': 'Africa/Nairobi'}, spec={'name': 'Forecast schema and sanity', 'cases': 'cities.json', 'case_id': 'name', 'request': {'path': 'forecast', 'params': {'latitude': '${case.latitude}', 'longitude': '${case.longitude}', 'hourly': 'temperature_2m', 'timezone': 'auto'}}, 'expect_status': 200, 'validator': 'ForecastValidator', 'validate': 'single', 'asserts': [{'path': '$.latitude', 'approx': '${case.latitude}', 'tol': 1.0}, {'path': '$.longitude', 'approx': '${case.longitude}', 'tol': 1.0}, {'path': '$.hourly.time', 'length_gte': '${env.min_results_count}'}]})
